summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No GitHub mutations are planned: low-signal and instant close are disabled, fix/raise_pr/merge are blocked, and each open PR either has unresolved review, maintainer-readiness, conflict, broad-scope, or technical-correctness gates.

actions.reason: Useful focused bug-fix PR, but it has an unresolved actionable Codex review-bot finding and requires maintainer technical judgment; no close, fix, or merge action is allowed in this job.
Focused contributor fix with sufficient proof, but conflict/dirty merge state and maintainer-review requirements block automated action in this close/comment/label-only inventory job.
Large user-facing i18n PR with review concerns and broad generated/locale churn; technical correctness and product-readiness require maintainer judgment.
Focused bug-fix PR with proof, but waiting-on-author status and a failing relevant check require human follow-up; merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.
Substantial plugin SDK/Gateway feature with active author follow-up and compatibility/API-boundary implications; maintainer product and technical judgment is required.

needs_human: #80915: decide whether the remaining Codex review-bot finding about title wikilinks with '?' is valid and whether the branch should be repaired or left for author follow-up.
#80916: decide conflict repair/maintainer review path for the focused memory placeholder fix; job cannot repair or merge.
#80955: decide whether the broad zh-CN chat i18n PR should be narrowed, repaired, or kept waiting for stronger proof/review.
#80957: decide author follow-up for waiting-on-author status and failing checks-node-agentic-agents before any merge path.
#80982: decide product/API boundary and readiness for the plugin-owned chat-stream renderer feature after active author follow-up.
